summary: Completed testing of Jobswish responsive design updates and contact information features. Backend APIs fully functional, responsive design working correctly for both laptop and mobile views, Resume Builder shows required contact fields.
passed_tests: Contact info fields in profile creation and retrieval
Shortlisted candidates endpoint returns full contact details
Laptop view (1920x1080) - 900px container width displays correctly
Mobile view (390x844) - 390px full width layout works properly
Resume Builder Contact Information section with Email and Phone fields
Required field indicators (*) shown for Email and Phone
Job seeker registration and profile creation flow
Responsive container sizing based on screen width

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (responsive design and core features working, minor validation testing incomplete)

action_item_for_main_agent: Complete testing of Email/WhatsApp contact button functionality in recruiter view of shortlisted candidates. Browser crashed during final validation testing but core features are working correctly.
